zh.Yinchuan, Ningxia, China: 中國寧夏回族自治區銀川市
zh.lifeSummary: 當Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols於1162年出生在蒙古Хэнтий時，她的父親弘吉剌特薛禪23歲，母親速壇23歲。她與Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin在蒙古結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年在蒙古享年68歲。

zh-hans.Yinchuan, Ningxia, China: 中国宁夏回族自治区银川市
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols于1162年出生在蒙古Хэнтий时，她的父亲弘吉剌特薛禪23岁，母亲速壇23岁。她与Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin在蒙古结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年在蒙古享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Üjin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish: derivative of Hue, a pet form of the French personal name Hugues (see Hugo ). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Dutch variant Ulijn.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of an unexplained first element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Hispanic or Amerindian (Mexico and Guatemala): unexplained.

variants.name: Hugo
meanings: German and French (mainly Lorraine): from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic compound personal names with the first element hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ (see Hugh ).
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Hugh  .

nameMeanings.name: Börte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Birger  , first found in the 16th century.

variants.name: Børre
meanings: variant of   Birger  , first found in the 16th century.

variants.name: Børge
meanings: variant of   Birger  , first found in the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols was born in 1162, in Khentii, Mongolia, her father, 弘吉剌特薛禪, was 23 and her mother, 速壇, was 23. She married Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin in Mongolia. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 10 daughters. She died in 1230, in Mongolia, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols est née en 1162, à Hentiy, Mongolie, son père, 弘吉剌特薛禪, avait 23 ans et sa mère, 速壇, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin à Mongolie. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée en 1230, à Mongolie, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols 1162 in Hentiy, Mongolei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater 弘吉剌特薛禪 23 und ihre Mutter 速壇 23. Sie hat in Mongolei Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb 1230 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Mongolei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols è nata il nel 1162 nel Hentiy, Mongolia, sua padre, 弘吉剌特薛禪, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, 速壇, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin nel Mongolia. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel Mongolia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.Yinchuan, Ningxia, China: 中国ニングクシア银川市
ja.lifeSummary: Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongolsが1162年にモンゴルХэнтийで生まれた時，父弘吉剌特薛禪は23歳，母速壇は23歳であった。モンゴルでGreat Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年にモンゴルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols(이)가 1162년 몽골 Хэнтий에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 弘吉剌特薛禪(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 速壇(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 몽골에서 Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 몽골에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Mongol Empire: Монгол, Хабаровский Край, Россия, Советтер Союз

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols nasceu em 1162, em Hentiy, Mongólia, seu pai, 弘吉剌特薛禪, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, 速壇, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin em Mongólia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1230, em Mongólia, com 68 anos.

ru.Mongol Empire: Монгол, Хабаровский Край, Россия, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols родилась в 1162 г. в местности Хэнтий, Монголия, её отцу по имени 弘吉剌特薛禪 было 23 года, а матери, которую звали 速壇, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin в местности Монголия. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла в 1230 г. в местности Монголия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Great Empress Börte Üjin Khatun of the Mongols nació en 1162, en Hentiy, Mongolia, su papá, 弘吉剌特薛禪, tenía 23 años y su mamá, 速壇, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Great Emperor Chingis Khaan Temujin en Mongolia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en 1230, en Mongolia, a la edad de 68 años.
